The ELYRA EAC firmware is priced at 190 EUR. It is compatible with 35t, 75t, 100t, and ZDMA cards, and features 1:1 Real Device Emulation. It has been undetected (UD) since its release 6 months ago and is suitable for games using EAC, such as Rust, Apex Legends, and Fortnite.

To proceed with your order, please let me know your preferred payment method:
* Crypto: No additional fees.
* PayPal: +30 EUR fee.
* Credit/Debit Card: +30 EUR fee.

Once you confirm your payment choice, a staff member will assist you with the finalization of your order.
